data.title: OpenAI and SoftBank jointly invest $1B in SB Energy for 1.2GW Texas data center, part of $5 trillion Stargate AI plan. (Read More)
data.description: OpenAI and SoftBank have jointly invested $500 million each in SB Energy for the development of a new data center in Texas that will have a capacity of 1.2 gigawatts. This strategic move aims to support the $5 trillion Stargate AI infrastructure initiative.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $2.48 resistance by January 2026. Currently trading at $2.13 with RSI at 52.82. Potential rally to $2.75-$3.30 range.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently trading at $2.13 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 52.82. Technical analysis suggests a potential target of $2.48 by the end of the month. If momentum continues to build, there is a possibility of a rally leading to a price range between $2.75 and $3.30.

data.title: Hongqi Golden Sunflower Guoya showcased at SailGP Abu Dhabi Grand Final, marks entry into Middle East market.
data.description: On November 30, 2025, during the SailGP Abu Dhabi Grand Final in Dubai, Hongqi Golden Sunflower’s Guoya had its first international appearance as the ceremonial vehicle for the championship trophy. This event also served as the official launch of the brand in the Middle East market, marking a significant move in its global expansion strategy. The Hongqi Golden Sunflower Guoya, renowned for its Eastern aesthetics and superior craftsmanship, received notable recognition during the event.

data.title: MATIC price expected to reach $0.45-$0.52 by Feb 2026, currently trading at $0.38 with potential bounce. 4-6 week target based on technical analysis.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38, and its neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates potential for an oversold rebound. Technical analysis forecasts price targets of $0.45 to $0.52 within the next 4 to 6 weeks.
